subject: chemistry
title: 20N.1.SL.TZ0.27
question_html:
Which mechanism does benzene most readily undergo?

A.  Nucleophilic substitution

B.  Electrophilic substitution

C.  Electrophilic addition

D.  Free radical substitution
examiners_html: Vast majority of candidates understood benzene undergoes substitution rather than addition, with some thinking of it as nucleophilic rather than electrophilic substitution.
